title: (Bearish Signal) MRUS, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling MRUS's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. A.I. dvisor identified 45 similar cases where MRUS's MACD histogram became negative, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $21.00 crossed the resistance line at $23.31 and is trading between $23.31 resistance and $16.36 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 04/22/21 - 05/24/21, the price experienced a -12% Downtrend. During the week of 05/17/21 - 05/24/21, the stock fell -7%.

https://preview.redd.it/4kjfu98zn9171.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=d9a70e439453adb696a395852427f5a805930d93

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for MRUS moved out of overbought territory on May 19, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 32 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 23 of the 32 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 72%.

MRUS moved below its 50-day Moving Average on May 20, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where MRUS declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

MRUS broke above its upper Bollinger Band on May 18, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.
